hero.title: Find Clarity in the Cards
hero.subtitle: Ask what is on your mind, draw the cards yourself, and receive thoughtful guidance for love, work, money, and life's turning points.

general.title: General Readings
general.desc: For open-ended questions, decisions, and moments when you need a clearer view of what is unfolding.

fortune.title: Personal Forecasts
fortune.desc: Look at the rhythm of your day, month, season, or year so you can move with more awareness.

themed.title: Themed Readings
themed.desc: Explore the areas people ask about most: love, career, study, money, and personal direction.

tagline: Divination reveals the current flow of energy, but the future is always in your hands.

spreads.unlockDesc:
This reading is exclusive to members.
View membership plans from $9.90/month before signing in or paying.

general.metaDesc: Choose a tarot spread for your question and find clearer guidance for the moment.
general.title: Tarot Spreads
general.desc: Choose a spread that fits your question and draw your cards.
general.tagline: Readings reflect the current moment. What you do next is always up to you.

love.metaDesc: Explore love, attraction, relationship dynamics, and emotional clarity through tarot.
love.subtitle: Choose a reading and gently explore what is moving beneath the surface.
love.tagline: The cards can reflect the flow of emotions, but real closeness still comes from sincerity meeting sincerity.

career.metaDesc: Explore directions, prepare for key milestones, and make clearer choices.
career.tagline: Readings can clarify the moment. Growth still comes from clear judgment and steady effort.

wealth.metaDesc: Explore money patterns, financial blocks, and grounded next steps through tarot.
wealth.tagline: The cards can reveal signs in your money flow, but lasting wealth grows from clear judgment and steady action.
